title: Dishwasher with drinkware spray container
abstract: A dishwasher (10) includes a drinkware spray container capable of directing a spray of fluid against one or more drinkware articles (296) retained by the spray container. The drinkware spray container may be configured as a cup tree (290) including a vertical member (292) or trunk and a plurality of branches (274) that extend from the trunk and support the drinkware article (296), with nozzles disposed on the branches (274) to direct the spray of fluid into the supported drinkware articles (296). The drinkware spray container may also be configured as a drinkware basket (300) including a container body (302) defining one or more compartments (310) along with one or more spray members (314) capable of directing the spray of fluid onto the interior surfaces of drinkware article (296) retained within the container body 9 (302).
claims:
